command:
bash -c '
set -e
# Create directory structure
sudo mkdir -p /opt/docker/stacks/infra/nats/config
sudo chown -R jose:jose /opt/docker/stacks

# Write nats-server config
cat > /opt/docker/stacks/infra/nats/config/nats.conf << '"'"'NATSCONF'"'"'
# NATS Server Configuration — Moreno AI Ecosystem
# Binds on all interfaces internally; not exposed externally

server_name: moreno-nats
listen: 0.0.0.0:4222
http: 0.0.0.0:8222

max_connections: 1000
max_payload: 1MB

# JetStream for persistent streams
jetstream {
  store_dir: /data
  max_memory_store: 512MB
  max_file_store: 2GB
}

# Logging
log_time: true
debug: false
trace: false

# Accounts / auth — open internally for now
# No TLS yet — internal ecosystem network only
NATSCONF

# Write docker-compose
cat > /opt/docker/stacks/infra/nats/docker-compose.yml << '"'"'COMPOSEEOF'"'"'
version: 3.8

services:
  nats:
    image: nats:2.10-alpine
    container_name: moreno-nats
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 4222:4222
      - 8222:8222
    volumes:
      - ./config/nats.conf:/etc/nats/nats.conf:ro
      - nats_data:/data
    command: [-c, /etc/nats/nats.conf]
    networks:
      - moreno-internal

networks:
  moreno-internal:
    driver: bridge
    name: moreno-internal

volumes:
  nats_data:
    driver: local
COMPOSEEOF

echo NATS_FILES_WRITTEN
ls /opt/docker/stacks/infra/nats/
'
